Bacterial transpeptidase and transglycosylase are essential en-
zymes for cell wall synthesis. Consequently, the search for antibi-
otics targeting them nowadays continues [40] . In this study, the
selective behavior of the synthesized compounds suggests that the
peptidoglycan synthesis process is disrupted. Therefore, the inter-
action between the most active synthesized compounds and these
two enzymes that play an important role in peptidoglycan syn-
thesis has been determined through molecular docking studies.
